plugins.name: rs-bun
plugins.description: Connect Rust and Bun end-to-end: bun:ffi bindings, napi-rs native addons, Rust→WASM (wasm-bindgen), the Rust↔Bun reference, and crate→Bun-package workflows. 5 skills + the bun-rs agent.

plugins.name: bun-agent
plugins.description: Bun-native agent suite co-located with the n2b Node→Bun migration CLI (Rust). 23 agents, 9 skills, the n2b binary, session/memory hooks.
